# AegisRoute

> Edge-routed URL shortening with AI threat detection and real-time analytics. Every redirect is inspected, scored, and decided in under 12ms at the perimeter.

AegisRoute pairs URL shortening with an ML threat-detection pipeline that inspects every redirect at the edge, scores risk in real time, and routes traffic through a global anycast network.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Product overview — intelligent routing, AI threat detection, analytics, global edge network, and security layers.
